filesCreated.objective: Validate successful booking creation with duo allocation
Validate successful cancellation of CONFIRMED booking with roster release

filesCreated.scenarioName: Get Booking Details - Happy Path (Companions Revealed)
filesCreated.objective: Validate authorized retrieval of booking details with companion information revealed (within T-5h window)
coverage: Companion reveal timing logic (current time >= startAt - 5 hours)
Companions array structure and ordering (CAPTAIN first, VICE_CAPTAIN second)
Companion public info fields (displayName, languages, profilePictureUrl, averageRating)

filesCreated.scenarioName: Internal Edit - Change Venue and Time (Happy Path)
filesCreated.objective: Validate internal edit of venue/time with atomic roster swap and artifact stability
coverage: Booking safety validations (CONFIRMED, not extended, not started, not progressed)
Atomic roster slot release and reservation (deadlock-safe)
Duo remains same when no reassignment requested

filesCreated.scenarioName: Internal Edit - Manual Duo Reassignment (Happy Path)
filesCreated.objective: Validate manual duo reassignment with roster swap and status reset
coverage: Atomic roster slot swap (old duo → new duo)

filesCreated.scenarioName: Create Booking - Client Already Has Non-Terminal Booking (409)
filesCreated.objective: Validate enforcement of one non-terminal booking per client rule
coverage: No booking created on constraint violation
No roster slots reserved on rejection

filesCreated.objective: Validate deterministic failure when no duo is available

filesCreated.scenarioName: Cancel Completed Booking - Invalid State Transition (400)
filesCreated.objective: Validate rejection of cancellation for COMPLETED bookings
Validate all safety constraints for internal edit endpoint

filesCreated.scenarioName: Get Booking Details - Before T-5h Reveal Window (Companions Hidden)
filesCreated.objective: Validate that companion information is hidden (companions: null) when current time is before the T-5h reveal window
coverage: Timed reveal boundary condition (current time < startAt - 5 hours)
companions field is null before reveal window

filesCreated.scenarioName: Get Booking Details - CANCELLED/COMPLETED Status (Companions Hidden)
filesCreated.objective: Validate that companion information is hidden (companions: null) when booking status is CANCELLED or COMPLETED
coverage: companions field is null for terminal statuses
Status blocks reveal regardless of timing

businessRulesValidated: State machine enforcement (CONFIRMED → ACTIVE → COMPLETED, CONFIRMED/ACTIVE → CANCELLED)
CLIENT-only authorization for booking details endpoint
authorizationPatterns: Bearer token (CLIENT role) for booking creation
Bearer token (booking owner, assigned companion, admin) for cancellation
Bearer token (CLIENT role, booking owner only) for details retrieval

designPrinciples: No hardcoded API payload values (use requiredPayloadFields and payloadRules)
Each step includes layman explanation for clarity
Assertions cover API, DB, and business rules
Edge cases cover failure paths and constraint enforcement
Artifact stability testing (qrCode, pinCode, etc. unchanged across edits)
notes: All test designs updated to reference Feature SDS v1.2.0
Tests cover all 4 endpoints: POST /bookings, POST /bookings/:id/cancel, GET /bookings/:id/details, PATCH /bookings/:id
GET /bookings/:id/details now includes timed companion reveal logic (T-5h window)
Internal edit endpoint has comprehensive safety constraint coverage
Idempotency and state machine enforcement are thoroughly tested
Designs follow Test Designer Agent instructions (step objects with layman descriptions, no hardcoded payloads)
Transitioned from DRAFT_SPEC to FINALIZED_EXECUTABLE after Coding Agent implementation
